mos_description_short: In this job, you’ll train in the use of small arms, anti-tank, and other weapons systems. You will learn to capture, destroy, and repel enemy ground forces during missions.
MOS job overview: As a first step toward becoming an Infantryman, you’ll train in the use of small arms, anti-tank, and other weapons systems. You will be responsible for capturing, destroying, and repelling enemy ground forces during missions. This is also the starting point for many advanced schools, such as Special Forces, Airborne School, Ranger School, Sniper School, and Pathfinder School.
requirements:
• 22 weeks of Infantry One Station Unit Training
• 77 ASVAB Score: Combat (CO)
Spanish_MOS Job Overview: Como primer paso para ser Soldado de Infantería, te capacitarás en el uso de armas pequeñas, armas anti-tanques y otros sistemas de armas. Serás responsable de capturar, derrotar y repeler a las fuerzas terrestres enemigas durante las misiones. Este será también tu punto de partida para muchas escuelas especializadas como Special Forces, Airborne School, Ranger School, Sniper School, y Pathfinder School.
Spanish_skills:
Evasión

Fuerza física y mental

Manejo de armas
Spanish_requirements:
• 14 semanas de entrenamiento básico 
• 87 Puntuación ASVAB: Combat (CO)
related_civilian_jobs_espanol:
• Especialista en capacitación corporativa
• Oficial de la ley
• Trabajador de planta automotriz
Spanish_job_type:
Enlistado
Oficial 
Servicio Activo 
Reserva del Army
Guardia Nacional del Army
Nivel Inicial
Legacy Soft Skills: readiness to accept challenge and danger
Physically and Mentally fit to perform under pressure
Spanish_bonus_text: Elegible para un bono de hasta $40,000 al enlistarse.
en_meta_description: In this job, you’ll train in the use of small arms, anti-tank, and other weapons systems. You will learn to capture, destroy, and repel enemy ground forces during missions.
testing_requirements: 22 weeks of Infantry One Station Unit Training
Requirements2: A U.S. Citizen or permanent resident with a valid Green Card

mos_description_short: In this job, you’ll supervise network management functions while helping troubleshoot and reengineer associated network assets. You’ll also perform routine maintenance checks on assigned vehicles and equipment.
MOS job overview: As a Network Communication Systems Specialist, you’ll be responsible for installing, repairing, and maintaining cabling and wiring, telecommunication systems, and network management facilities. You’ll install communications networks while helping troubleshoot and reengineer assets to support operational requirements and ensure communication systems are working.
requirements:
10 weeks of Basic Training
• 19 weeks of Advanced
Individual Training
Spanish_MOS Job Overview:
Como Especialista en Sistemas de Comunicaciones de Red, supervisarás el manejo de las funciones de la red y el centro de control de las redes integradas y los sistemas de comunicaciones multicanal.
Esto incluye la instalación de fibra táctica y cableado, además de ayudar a solucionar problemas y reestructurar los activos de red relacionados, para apoyar los requisitos operativos. También darás mantenimiento rutinario a los vehículos asignados, a los generadores de energía y al equipamiento.
Spanish_skills:
Solución de problemas electrónicos
Mantenimiento y reparaciones
Spanish_requirements:
10 semanas de Basic Training
• 19 semanas de Advanced Individual Training
• 102 de puntuación ASVAB:
Electronics (EL)
• 105 de puntuación ASVAB: Skilled
Technical (ST)
en_meta_description: In this job, you’ll supervise network management functions while helping troubleshoot and reengineer associated network assets. You’ll also perform routine maintenance checks on assigned vehicles and equipment.
Requirements2: Eligible for a Secret Security Clearance

mos_description_short: In this job, you'll administer emergency medical care in the field in both combat and humanitarian situations, and train other soldiers first responder procedures.
MOS job overview: As a Combat Medic Specialist, you’ll deliver emergency medical care in high-pressure situations, from accidents and natural disasters to military training and operations. You’ll assess injuries, stabilize patients, and make critical medical decisions under extreme conditions. You’ll also train other Soldiers in first aid and provide ongoing medical support on base.
requirements:
• 10 weeks of Basic Training 
• 16 weeks of Advanced Individual Training
• 101 ASVAB Score: Skilled Technical (ST)
• 107 ASVAB Score: General Technical (GT)
Spanish_MOS Job Overview: Como Médico Especialista de Combate, darás atención médica de emergencia en el campo de operaciones, tanto en situaciones de combate como humanitarias. Tu entrenamiento te permitirá dar primeros auxilios y clasificar enfermedades y lesiones para salvar vidas, tal como lo hace un paramédico en el mundo civil. También entrenarás a otros Soldados en cursos de salvamento/primeros auxilios y darás atención en la base cuando no haya despliegues.
Spanish_skills:
Cuidado médico de emergencia 

Cuidado al paciente 

Instrucción y capacitación
Spanish_requirements:
• 10 semanas de entrenamiento básico
• 16 semanas de entrenamiento individual avanzado
• 101 Puntuación ASVAB: Skilled Technical (ST)
• 107 Puntuación ASVAB: General Technical (GT)
related_civilian_jobs_espanol:
• Técnico médico (EMT) / paramédico 
• Asistente médico / quirúrgico 
• Enfermero en salud pública
Spanish_job_type:
Enlistado
Oficial 
Servicio Activo 
Reserva del Army
Guardia Nacional del Army
Nivel Inicial
Legacy Soft Skills: Enjoy helping and caring for others
Spanish_bonus_text: Elegible para un bono de hasta $15,000 al enlistarse.
en_meta_description: In this job, you'll administer emergency medical care in the field in both combat and humanitarian situations, and train other soldiers first responder procedures.
Requirements2: Be a U.S. Citizen or permanent resident with a valid Green Card
Meet qualifications to work in a medical setting
additional_details: The Army Civilian Acquired Skills Program (ACASP) can reduce the length of your initial training and streamline your assignment process so you can start your Army career sooner. Prior skills or experience relating to this career may put you in position to join the Army at a higher rank, earn more pay, and obtain leadership positions quicker. Work with a recruiter to get started.

mos_description_short: In this job, you'll repair and maintain UH-60 ("Black Hawk") Helicopters.
MOS job overview: As a UH-60 Helicopter Repairer/Aircrew Member, you’ll maintain and fix UH-60 "Black Hawk" helicopters, making sure they are safe and ready to fly for hundreds of Army missions. You’ll also perform and supervise inspections, prepare aircraft maintenance forms and records, supervise inspections, and ensure themost stringent standards are met to accomplish essential flight missions.
requirements:
• 10 weeks of Basic Training 
• 15 weeks of Advanced Individual Training
• 104 ASVAB Score: Mechanical Maintenance (MM)
Spanish_MOS Job Overview: Como Reparador del Helicóptero UH-60, serás experto de los sistemas mecánicos y del exterior e interior del legendario “Black Hawk”. Obtendrás experiencia en desmontaje y reconstrucción de motores, reparación de fuselajes/revestimientos de aluminio, acero y fibra de vidrio, y del mantenimiento de los sistemas hidráulico y de combustible y eléctrico, para que cada helicóptero esté listo para su función.
Spanish_skills:
Operaciones de aviación 

Mantenimiento mecánico 

Electrónica y mecánica
Spanish_requirements:
• 10 semanas de entrenamiento básico
• 15 semanas de entrenamiento individual avanzado
• 104 Puntuación ASVAB: Mechanical Maintenance (MM)
related_civilian_jobs_espanol:
• Mecánico y técnico de aeronaves
• Mecánico de vehículos y equipo pesado
• Trabajador de mantenimiento de carreteras y maquinaria
Spanish_job_type:
Enlistado
Oficial 
Servicio Activo 
Reserva del Army
Guardia Nacional del Army
Nivel Inicial
en_meta_description: In this job, you'll repair and maintain UH-60 ("Black Hawk") Helicopters.
Requirements2: A U.S. Citizen or permanent resident with a valid Green Card
Eligible for a Secret Security Clearance

mos_description_short: In this job, you’ll supply the Army with the fuel it needs to maintain a state of readiness at all times. You’ll supervise and manage the reception, storage, and shipping of bulk or packaged petroleum-based products.
MOS job overview: As a Petroleum Supply Specialist, you’ll supply the Army with the fuel it needs to maintain a state of readiness at all times. You’ll supervise and manage the reception, storage, and shipping of bulk or packaged petroleum-based products. You’ll oversee its use, dispense it to various vehicles and aircraft, and make sure it is being transported and handled safely. You will learn how refueling systems and equipment are assembled sequentially, perform quality assurance, and you’ll supply and store fuel from a variety of sources.
requirements:
• 10 weeks of Basic Training 
• 11 weeks of Advanced Individual Training
• 86 ASVAB Score: Clerical (CL)
• 85 ASVAB Score: Operators & Food (OF)
Spanish_MOS Job Overview: Como Especialista de Suministro de Petróleo, proporcionarás el combustible que el Army necesita para estar listo a cualquier hora. Supervisarás y manejarás la recepción, conservación y distribución de grandes cantidades de productos o productos a base de petróleo envasados.  Vigilarás su uso, lo suministrarás a varios vehículos y aeronaves, y garantizarás que se maneje y transporte de manera segura. Aprenderás cómo se ensamblan secuencialmente los sistemas y equipos de reabastecimiento de combustible, te encargarás del control de calidad, y lo suministrarás y conservarás desde una variedad de fuentes.
Spanish_skills:
Sistemas de reabastecimiento de combustible

Mecánica de taller

Planificación y programación
Spanish_requirements:
• 10 semanas de entrenamiento básico 
• 11 semanas de entrenamiento individual avanzado 
• 86 Puntuación ASVAB: Clerical (CL)
• 85 Puntuación ASVAB: Operators & Food (OF)
related_civilian_jobs_espanol:
• Especialista en reabastecimiento de combustible de aeronaves
• Operador del sistema de bomba de refinería petrolera
• Gerente de distribución
Spanish_job_type:
Enlistado
Oficial 
Servicio Activo 
Reserva del Army
Guardia Nacional del Army
Nivel Inicial
Legacy Soft Skills: Interest in warehouse and shipping procedures
Basic Job Explanation: Supervise shipping and storage of fuel
Spanish_bonus_text: Elegible para un bono de hasta $7,500 al enlistarse.
en_meta_description: In this job, you’ll supply the Army with the fuel it needs to maintain a state of readiness at all times. You’ll supervise and manage the reception, storage, and shipping of bulk or packaged petroleum-based products.
Requirements2: A U.S. Citizen or permanent resident with a valid Green Card
additional_details: The Army Civilian Acquired Skills Program (ACASP) can reduce the length of your initial training and streamline your assignment process so you can start your Army career sooner. Prior skills or experience relating to this career may put you in position to join the Army at a higher rank, earn more pay, and obtain leadership positions quicker. Work with a recruiter to get started.

mos_description_short: In this job, you’ll be responsible for providing the Army with crucial and reliable information about enemy forces and potential areas of conflict. Additionally, you'll analyze and distribute tactical intelligence.
MOS job overview: As an Intelligence Analyst, you’ll be responsible for providing the Army with crucial and reliable information about enemy forces and potential areas of conflict. You’ll analyze, assess, process, and distribute tactical intelligence, as well as create, document, organize, and cross-reference intelligence records and files.
requirements:
• 10 weeks of Basic Training 
• 13 weeks of Advanced Individual Training
• 101 ASVAB Score: Skilled Technical (ST)
Spanish_MOS Job Overview: Como Analista de Inteligencia, serás responsable de dar al Army información crucial y confiable sobre las fuerzas enemigas y áreas posibles de conflicto. Analizarás, evaluarás, procesarás y distribuirás información táctica. También crearás, documentarás, organizarás y compararás registros y archivos de inteligencia.
Spanish_skills:
Recopilación de información 

Análisis de información 

Registro de archivos
Spanish_requirements:
• 10 semanas de entrenamiento básico
• 13 semanas de entrenamiento individual avanzado
• 101 Puntuación ASVAB: Skilled Technical (ST)
related_civilian_jobs_espanol:
• Analista de inteligencia de negocios
• Analista de ciberseguridad
• Investigador criminal

mos_description_short: In this job, you will train to use artillery weapons to destroy, neutralize, or suppress enemy forces using cannon, rocket, and missile fire.
MOS job overview: As a Field Artillery Soldier, you will train to use artillery weapons to destroy, neutralize, or suppress enemy forces using cannon, rocket, and missile fire. Soldiers in this branch will be assigned as a [13B](https://www.goarmy.com/careers-and-jobs/ground-forces/explosives-artillery/13b-cannon-crewmember), [13F](https://www.goarmy.com/careers-and-jobs/ground-forces/explosives-artillery/13f-joint-fire-support-specialist), [13J](https://www.goarmy.com/careers-and-jobs/ground-forces/explosives-artillery/13j-fire-control-specialist), [13M](https://www.goarmy.com/careers-and-jobs/ground-forces/explosives-artillery/13m-rocket-system-crewmember), or [13R](https://www.goarmy.com/careers-and-jobs/ground-forces/explosives-artillery/13r-weapons-locating-radar-operator) based on available Army opportunities and skills assessed at Basic Combat Training.
en_meta_description: In this job, you will train to use artillery weapons to destroy, neutralize, or suppress enemy forces using cannon, rocket, and missile fire.
testing_requirements: 6-10 weeks of Advanced Individual Training (AIT) dependent on MOS
Requirements2: Be a U.S. Citizen or permanent resident with a valid Green Card
